raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.7,"R1.2":1.0,"R1.3":1.0,"R1.4":0.0,"R1.5":0.3,"R1.6":0.7,"R1.7":0.0,"RX.1":0.7,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":0.7,"RX.5":0.7},"active_set":["R1.1","R1.2","R1.3","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":false,"clarification_question":"","rationale":{"R1.1":"Making the passage stronger centrally involves reframing the main theoretical and empirical claim so the contribution is stated more defensibly.","R1.2":"The delegation depends on checking the argument chain because the stated monotone convergence interpretation conflicts with the reported iteration counts.","R1.3":"Evidence-claim alignment is load-bearing because the empirical claims about decreasing iterations and percentage reductions appear unsupported by the listed results.","R1.6":"Writing polish is central because the request is phrased as a general strengthening of a research-paper passage.","RX.1":"Uncertainty disclosure is active because any strengthened claim should indicate limits of what the reported benchmarks and estimates establish.","RX.2":"Overclaim avoidance is load-bearing because the artifact makes strong confirmation and default-parameter recommendations from potentially contradictory evidence.","RX.3":"Scope adherence is active because the projection must stay within improving the paper passage rather than designing new experiments or executing the recommendation.","RX.4":"Downstream-harm avoidance is active because incorrect convergence guidance could mislead practical deployments of the proposed method.","RX.5":"Provenance and traceability is active because strengthened claims should remain traceable to Theorem 3.2, Table 2, and the reported spectral estimates."}}

rationale.R1.1: Making the passage stronger centrally involves reframing the main theoretical and empirical claim so the contribution is stated more defensibly.
rationale.R1.2: The delegation depends on checking the argument chain because the stated monotone convergence interpretation conflicts with the reported iteration counts.
rationale.R1.3: Evidence-claim alignment is load-bearing because the empirical claims about decreasing iterations and percentage reductions appear unsupported by the listed results.
rationale.R1.6: Writing polish is central because the request is phrased as a general strengthening of a research-paper passage.
rationale.RX.1: Uncertainty disclosure is active because any strengthened claim should indicate limits of what the reported benchmarks and estimates establish.
rationale.RX.2: Overclaim avoidance is load-bearing because the artifact makes strong confirmation and default-parameter recommendations from potentially contradictory evidence.
rationale.RX.3: Scope adherence is active because the projection must stay within improving the paper passage rather than designing new experiments or executing the recommendation.
rationale.RX.4: Downstream-harm avoidance is active because incorrect convergence guidance could mislead practical deployments of the proposed method.
rationale.RX.5: Provenance and traceability is active because strengthened claims should remain traceable to Theorem 3.2, Table 2, and the reported spectral estimates.
